page.title: melanoma — RepurpOS | OpenSourceMedicine
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for melanoma: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for melanoma: 133 alterations and 1068 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

gmi_articles.title: The efficacy of curcumin application to melanoma in mice.
Coffee intake was associated with reduced risk of oral, pharynx, liver, colon, prostate, endometrial cancer and melanoma, but increased lung cancer risk.
Hypnotic drugs increase the risk of skin cancer.
There is some evidence for the beneficial effects of regular coffee consumption on melanoma.
Mineral oil exposures also contribute to the incidence and mortality of lung, melanoma, and possibly esophageal and stomach cancers and of non-Hodgkin's lymphoma in aerospace workers.
A high vitamin D status may benefit prognosis in patients diagnosed with primary melanoma.
consumption of caffeinated coffee was inversely associated with melanoma risk among men.
Decreased vitamin D serum levels at melanoma diagnosis are associated with tumor ulceration and high tumor mitotic rate.
Dl-alpha-tocopherol acetate does not protect against chemotherapy-induced chromosome damage and reduces the level of plasma gamma tocopherol.
Evaluation of biodistribution of sulforaphane after administration of oral broccoli sprout extract in melanoma patients.
Gerson therapy may have therapeutic efficacy in the treatment of melanoma patients.
Increased UVA exposures (indoor light) and decreased cutaneous Vitamin D(3) levels may be responsible for the increasing incidence of melanoma.
Melanoma skin cancer rates increased with decreased levels of vitamin D.
Red and processed meat intake was inversely associated with melanoma risk in these two cohorts.
Statin drug use is associated with increased incidence of melanoma and non-melanoma skin cancers.
The authors of this study concluded that melanoma is associated with exposure to FM broadcasting.
The Mediterranean Diet is associated with lower risk of skin cancer,
The study suggests an augmented risk of cutaneous melanoma among subjects with exposure to pesticides.
The use of sildenafil may be associated with a higher risk of melanoma in men.
These results suggest that coffee drinking may protect against liver, ovarian, thyroid and endometrial cancers and melanoma.
Vitamin D deficiency in melanoma patients is associated with worse overall survival.
An extract of Rosmarinus officinals L. was able to efficiently reduce the proliferation of the human melanoma A375 cells.
Antiproliferative and proapoptotic effects of erucin, a diet-derived H2S donor, on human melanoma cells.
Apigenin is a novel therapeutic candidate for melanoma.
Blue LED irradiation induces apoptotic cell death by activating the mitochondria-mediated pathway and reduces the early growth rate of melanoma cells.
Delta tocotrienol might represent an effective option for chemopreventive strategies for melanoma.
The combination of HSP70 with phloretin could be a novel treatment for efficient immunotherapy of intractable cancers such as skin melanoma.
gmi_articles.study_type: Human In Vitro, In Vitro Study

gmi_articles.title: The present study shows that lichen compounds demonstrated strong antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anticancer properties.
Zerumbone has chemotherapeutic effects on human melanoma cells by altering mitochondrial function.
3,3'-Diindolylmethane improves antitumor immune responses of PD-1 blockade via inhibiting myeloid-derived suppressor cells.
Arctigenin suppresses melanoma cells.
Blue light promotes vitamin C-mediated ferroptosis of melanoma through specifically upregulating transporter SVCT2 and generating Fe2.
Capsaicin exerts therapeutic effects by targeting tNOX-SIRT1 axis and augmenting ROS-dependent autophagy in melanoma cancer cells.
Chrysin-induced regression of angiogenesis in models of melanoma.
Cortex Mori extracts induce apoptosis and inhibit tumor invasion via blockage of the PI3K/AKT signaling in melanoma cells.
Cucurbitacin B-induced G2/M cell cycle arrest of conjunctival melanoma cells.
Diosmetin augments BRAF-targeted therapy via concurrent suppression of MAPK and STAT3 pathways in melanoma.
Experimental study on biomimetic curcumin-mediated sonodynamic therapy of melanoma.
Ginsenoside Re inhibits melanogenesis and melanoma growth.
Hyaluronidase inhibitor delphinidin inhibits cancer metastasis.

natural_products.name: Coffee
natural_products.key_findings: Meta Analysis: Coffee intake was associated with reduced risk of oral, pharynx, liver, colon, prostate, endometrial cancer and melanoma, but increased lung canc; Meta Analysis, Review: There is some evidence for the beneficial effects of regular coffee consumption on melanoma.

natural_products.name: 2-phenyl-1-benzopyrylium
natural_products.key_findings: Animal Study, In Vitro Study: Hyaluronidase inhibitor delphinidin inhibits cancer metastasis.

natural_products.name: Lichens
natural_products.key_findings: Human In Vitro: The present study shows that lichen compounds demonstrated strong antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anticancer properties.

natural_products.name: Cucurbitacin B
natural_products.key_findings: Animal Study, In Vitro Study: Cucurbitacin B-induced G2/M cell cycle arrest of conjunctival melanoma cells.

natural_products.name: Diosmetin
natural_products.key_findings: Animal Study, In Vitro Study: Diosmetin augments BRAF-targeted therapy via concurrent suppression of MAPK and STAT3 pathways in melanoma.

natural_products.key_findings: Meta Analysis, Review: There is some evidence for the beneficial effects of regular coffee consumption on melanoma.

natural_products.name: caffeine
natural_products.key_findings: Human Study: consumption of caffeinated coffee was inversely associated with melanoma risk among men.

natural_products.name: Broccoli Sprouts
natural_products.key_findings: Human Study: Evaluation of biodistribution of sulforaphane after administration of oral broccoli sprout extract in melanoma patients.

natural_products.name: Rosemary
natural_products.key_findings: Human In Vitro: An extract of Rosmarinus officinals L. was able to efficiently reduce the proliferation of the human melanoma A375 cells.

natural_products.name: Arugula
natural_products.key_findings: Human In Vitro: Antiproliferative and proapoptotic effects of erucin, a diet-derived H2S donor, on human melanoma cells.

natural_products.name: Tocotrienol: Delta
natural_products.key_findings: Animal Study, Human In Vitro: Delta tocotrienol might represent an effective option for chemopreventive strategies for melanoma.

natural_products.name: Phloretin
natural_products.key_findings: Human In Vitro, In Vitro Study: The combination of HSP70 with phloretin could be a novel treatment for efficient immunotherapy of intractable cancers such as sk

natural_products.name: Zerumbone
natural_products.key_findings: Human In Vitro: Zerumbone has chemotherapeutic effects on human melanoma cells by altering mitochondrial function.

natural_products.name: Arctigenin
natural_products.key_findings: Animal Study, In Vitro Study: Arctigenin suppresses melanoma cells.

natural_products.name: Capsaicin
natural_products.key_findings: Animal Study, In Vitro Study: Capsaicin exerts therapeutic effects by targeting tNOX-SIRT1 axis and augmenting ROS-dependent autophagy in melanoma cancer cells.

natural_products.name: White Mulberry
natural_products.key_findings: Animal Study, In Vitro Study: Cortex Mori extracts induce apoptosis and inhibit tumor invasion via blockage of the PI3K/AKT signaling in melanoma cells.

disclaimer: Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.

remission.spontaneous_remission_rate: Spontaneous regression documented in ~0.4% of metastatic melanoma cases; early-stage surgical resection: 90%+ 5-year survival for Stage I; Stage IV (metastatic): historically <10% 5-year survival
remission.best_intervention_remission_rate: Stage IV with PD-1/CTLA-4 combination (nivolumab + ipilimumab): 52% 5-year OS (CheckMate-067); BRAF V600E + MEK inhibition (dabrafenib + trametinib): 34% 5-year OS; pembrolizumab adjuvant Stage III: 58.4% vs 45.9% RFS at 5 years; TIL therapy (Amtagvi): 31.5% ORR in heavily pretreated patients
remission.gap_size: Moderate — genuine cures are now achievable for many Stage IV melanoma patients; the question is maximising who can access these outcomes
remission.barrier_detail: Immunotherapy combination (nivolumab + ipilimumab) achieves durable responses in ~25-30% of Stage IV patients (functional cure); BRAF-targeted therapy is highly effective in BRAF V600E (50% of melanomas) but resistance develops in most; tumour-infiltrating lymphocyte (TIL) therapy (Amtagvi, 2024) approved — cell manufacturing is complex
remission.last_soc_change: 2024 — Amtagvi (lifileucel, TIL therapy) FDA approved — first tumour-infiltrating lymphocyte cell therapy approved for any cancer; 2020 adjuvant pembrolizumab Stage IIB-III; 2011 ipilimumab (first checkpoint inhibitor approved for any cancer); PD-1 inhibitors since 2014
remission.outdated_treatments: Dacarbazine chemotherapy as primary treatment for Stage IV without immunotherapy or targeted therapy assessment (historical standard; response rate <15%, no OS benefit; completely superseded by immunotherapy for eligible patients); high-dose IL-2 (response rate similar to modern IO but extreme toxicity; now rarely used outside of IL-2-responder prediction platforms)
remission.adjunctive_emerging: mRNA personalised therapeutic vaccines (mRNA-4157/V940 + pembrolizumab: 65% reduction in recurrence risk at 3 years in resected Stage III/IV — KEYNOTE-942); exercise during checkpoint inhibitor therapy (reduces immune-related adverse events); Mediterranean diet; UV photoprotection for skin surveillance
remission.frontier_signal: mRNA personalised cancer vaccines (mRNA-4157 — Phase 3 KEYNOTE-942A underway after remarkable Phase 2 data); TIL expansion approaches (Amtagvi expanding to adjuvant setting); anti-LAG-3 + anti-PD-1 (relatlimab — Opdualag approved 2022); intratumoral injection approaches; CAR-T for metastatic melanoma
remission.notes: Manually curated from landmark trials, registries, and guidelines (disease_db_100.json). Protected from automated overwrite.

burden.note: Tier from NIH FY funding ÷ US DALYs (or mortality proxy) vs corpus quartiles
